---
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    width: 1280
    height: 720
pagetitle: Chat Bubbles Example
echo: false
code-line-numbers: false
revealjs-plugins:
  - chat-bubbles
---

## Romeo & Juliet — Act II, Scene II

*Romeo · Juliet*

::: {.chat}
::: {.bubble-left}
O Romeo, Romeo, wherefore art thou Romeo?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
I take thee at thy word. Call me but love, and I'll be new baptized.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
What man art thou that, thus bescreened in night, so stumblest on my counsel?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
By a name I know not how to tell thee who I am. My name, dear saint, is hateful to myself.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
My ears have not yet drunk a hundred words of that tongue's uttering, yet I know the sound.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
Alack, there lies more peril in thine eye than twenty of their swords.
:::
:::

## Little Women — Chapter XI

*Jo · Meg · Amy · Beth*

::: {.chat}
::: {.bubble-right}
I shall write a splendid book someday, and then we shall all be proud of me!
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
We are proud of you now, Jo, but do try to speak properly.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-2}
I think it's very becoming to be modest about one's gifts.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-3}
I hope the book will be very good, Jo.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
It shall be! Full of thrilling adventure and noble heroines. Nothing meek about them.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Nothing meek at all, I'm sure of that.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-2}
Will there be any fashionable people in it?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
Plenty of interesting ones, Amy, but fashionable is not the same as interesting.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-3}
I should like to read it very much.
:::
:::

## Hamlet — Act I, Scene V

*Hamlet · Horatio · Marcellus*

::: {.chat}
::: {.bubble-right}
There are more things in heaven and earth, Horatio, than are dreamt of in your philosophy.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
O day and night, but this is wondrous strange!
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-2}
How is't, my noble lord?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
O, wonderful!
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Good my lord, tell it.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
No, you'll reveal it.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Not I, my lord, by heaven.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-2}
Nor I, my lord.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
How say you then — would heart of man once think it? But you'll be secret?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Ay, by heaven, my lord.
:::
:::

## Hamlet — Reactions Demo

*Hamlet · Horatio · Marcellus*

::: {.chat}
::: {.bubble-right}
There are more things in heaven and earth, Horatio, than are dreamt of in your philosophy.
:::

[😮]{.fragment .reaction}

[👍]{.fragment .reaction}

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
O day and night, but this is wondrous strange!
:::

[😂]{.fragment .reaction}

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
And therefore as a stranger give it welcome.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-2}
How is't, my noble lord?
:::

[❤️]{.fragment .reaction}

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
O, wonderful!
:::

[😂]{.fragment .reaction}

[🎭]{.fragment .reaction}
:::

## Hamlet — Delayed Reactions

*Hamlet · Horatio · Marcellus*

::: {.chat}
::: {.bubble-right}
There are more things in heaven and earth, Horatio, than are dreamt of in your philosophy.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left fragment-index="1"}
O day and night, but this is wondrous strange!
:::

[😮]{.fragment .reaction fragment-index="4"}

[❤️]{.fragment .reaction fragment-index="5"}

::: {.fragment .bubble-right fragment-index="2"}
And therefore as a stranger give it welcome.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-2 fragment-index="3"}
How is't, my noble lord?
:::
:::

## Plot Output Demo

*Analyst · Colleague*

::: {.chat}
::: {.bubble-left}
Can you show me the displacement vs. fuel economy relationship?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
```{r}
plot(mpg ~ disp, data = mtcars)
```
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Clear negative relationship — bigger engines, worse mileage.
:::
:::

## Image Bubbles Demo

*Romeo · Juliet*

::: {.chat}
::: {.bubble-right}
How dost thou fare this fine morning?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
![](giphy.gif)
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
Ha! I see thou art in good spirits.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Always, when I think of thee.
:::
:::

## Typing Indicator Demo

*Romeo · Juliet*

::: {.chat}
::: {.bubble-right}
Wherefore art thou?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left .typing}
I've been here all along beneath thy window.
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right .typing}
Then why didst thou not speak sooner?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left .typing}
I was composing the perfect words.
:::
:::
